The '''Mandalorian disintegrator''' was the deadliest [[Disruptor pistol/Legends|disruptor pistol]] available during the [[Dark Wars]], a series of conflicts fought between [[Sith Triumvirate|remnants]] of the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] and the forces of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] occurring after the [[Jedi Civil War]]. The [[Disruptor/Legends|disintegrator]] was designed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] culture and was in violation of the Republic legal code. Like other disruptors of its time, the Mandalorian disintegrator fired energy bolts that ignored [[Personal energy shield/Legends|personal energy shields]].

==Description==
The Mandalorian disintegrator was a powerful and accurate [[Disruptor pistol/Legends|disruptor pistol]] with an effective range of twenty-three [[Meter/Legends|meters]],<ref name="kotor2" /> which was comparable to other disruptor pistols of its [[Time/Legends|time]].<ref name="kotor2range">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' has a generic [[Disruptor pistol/Legends|disruptor pistol]] with a range of twenty-three [[Meter/Legends|meters]].</ref> The [[Color/Legends|white-colored]] energy bolts fired from the disintegrator passed through most [[Personal energy shield/Legends|personal energy shields]] and caused much more damage than contemporary disruptor pistol designs. The weapon was similar in appearance to the [[Mandalorian ripper]], another disruptor weapon around at the same time as the disintegrator; it was silver in color, with a brown-colored hand grip and a wide [[Barrel/Legends|barrel]]. [[Human/Legends|Human]]-sized [[Species/Legends|species]] needed one [[Limb/Legends|hand]] to operate the weapon, which was capable of receiving upgrades to its [[firing chamber]], [[Power cell/Legends|power cell]], and [[targeting scope]].<ref name="kotor2" />

==History==
Designed by the warlike [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] culture, the Mandalorian disintegrator was the deadliest disruptor pistol in existence<ref name="kotor2" /> during the [[Dark Wars]], a string of conflicts<ref name="kotorcg" /> that were fought between leftovers of the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] and the forces of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] after the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Like other disruptor weapons of its time, the use of the disintegrator was a major violation of the legal code of the Galactic Republic. The pistol was an extremely rare and expensive weapon,<ref name="kotor2" /> and in [[3951 BBY]],<ref name="kotorcg" /> it cost as much as 26,950 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] when it was available for sale.<ref name="kotor2" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Mandalorian disintegrator first appeared in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', a [[2004]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] by [[Obsidian Entertainment]]. In ''The Sith Lords'', it was a rare ranged weapon which could be found in randomly determined locations throughout the game, which meant that the player was not guaranteed to find the pistol every time they played through the game. The disintegrator was one of the most powerful pistols in the game, it possessed a moderate attack bonus, and the weapon could be equipped with any ranged weapon upgrade.<ref name="kotor2" />
